name: Leonardo S.p.a.
summary: Leonardo S.p.a. engages in the helicopters, defense electronics and security systems, aeronautics, space, and other businesses in Italy, the United Kingdom, rest of Europe, the United States, and internationally. It researches, designs, develops, produces, supports, and markets a range of helicopters for commercial, public service, and security and defense applications. The company also offers multi-mission, tactical transport, combat, and trainer aircraft; airborne solutions, such as components, airborne sensors, and effectors in the electromagnetic spectrum, as well as ISR/information/intelligence, surveillance, targeting acquisition, and reconnaissance; unmanned aerial systems; and aero structures. In addition, it provides command, control, communications, and computers solutions for the digital battlefield; air defense solutions; air traffic control and management; vehicle systems; land weapon systems; soldier systems; force protection and border control products; radars; communication products; optronics; electronic warfare products; and unmanned systems for land operations. Further, the company offers command and control, maritime domain awareness, and weapon systems for sea; and cyber and digital solutions, professional communications, operation and control products, and handling systems. Additionally, it provides services and infrastructures, space and alliance, payloads and equipment, and programs for space, as well as services and trainings. The company was formerly known as Leonardo √Ç¬ñ Finmeccanica S.p.a. and changed its name to Leonardo S.p.a. in January 2017. Leonardo S.p.a. was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Rome, Italy.
